type.fr: Commentaire sur le statut de déclaration de la substance

comments.comment: Change in Estimation Method - No change in computation method but change in name on this report from Engineering Estimate to published Emissions Factors. Method used remains  EPA (2006) Unpaved Roads-Chapter 13.2.2, AP-42, Compilation of Air Pollutant Emission Factors, Volume 1, Stationary Point and Area Sources, USEPA, USA.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
1) Change in Estimation Method - No change in computation method but change in name on this report from Engineering Estimate to published Emissions Factors. Method used remains  EPA (2006) Unpaved Roads-Chapter 13.2.2, AP-42, Compilation of Air Pollutant Emission Factors, Volume 1, Stationary Point and Area Sources, USEPA, USA.
2) Pollution Prevention Plan - The method of mitigation of the release of road dust is to apply water to graveled road surfaces. The extent of the mitigation plan varies in time and intensity as the opacity of the road dust release changes
3) Nature of Activities - This facility is a non-hazardous waste, septic waste and recycling facility and traffic volumes change according to market conditions. An increase or decrease in traffic volumes commensurately  increases or decreases potential fugitive road dust generation. 
4) Activities / Non-Annual Events - During this reporting period, construction of a new waste disposal containment cell occurred. This resulted in increased vehicle traffic required for construction materials delivery on site roadways.
5) Other - Road dust generation occurs during periods of dry and unfrozen weather conditions. Weather conditions vary from year to year resulting in a commensurate increase or a decrease in a road dust generation.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Fugitive road dust quantities are a function of natural weather conditions. Dust generating days increased to 115 in 2020 compared to 84 in 2019 - a 37% increase. Conversely, Kilometers driven on unpaved site roads decreased by 3%. Despite an active dust control suppression program using water on travelled roads, TPM, PM10 & PM2.5 emissions increased by 25%.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Fugitive road dust quantities are a function of natural weather conditions. Dust generating days increased to 115 in 2020 compared to 84 in 2019 - a 37% increase. Conversely, Kilometers driven on unpaved site roads decreased by 3%. Despite active dust control suppression  program using regular water on travelled roads, TPM, PM10 & PM2.5 emissions increased by 25%.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Fugitive road dust quantities are a function of natural weather conditions. Dust generating days increased to 115 in 2020 compared to 84 in 2019 - a 37% increase. Conversely, Kilometers driven on unpaved site roads decreased by 3%. Despite an active dust control suppression program using water on travelled roads, TPM, PM10 & PM2.5 emissions increased by 25%.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
1) This facility receives non-hazardous waste delivered from collection facilities or individual business and residential locations. The quantity of vehicles delivering wastes to the facility year-by-year varies as business and residential waste generation varies.. 2023 exhibited an approximate 3% increase in vehicular entering the site. As the volume of vehicles increases, the potential for release of dust from unpaved roads increases proportionally.
2) 2023 was a particularly wet year climatically. significant periods of the years experienced freezing conditions and  heavy rains. as a result, the potential for generation of TPM, PM 10 and PM 2.5 was significantly reduced despite increased vehicular traffic.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: This facility receives non-hazardous waste delivered from collection facilities or individual business and residential locations. The quantity of vehicles delivering wastes to the facility year-by-year varies as business and residential waste generation varies. 2024 exhibited an approximate 5% increase in waste delivery vehicular traffic entering the site compared to 2023. As the volume of vehicles increases, the potential for release of dust from unpaved roads increases proportionally.  The actions of the site team resulted in a marginal 1% decrease in particulate emissions compared to 2023, despite a drier year than 2023 and an increase in vehicular traffic in 2024.
